creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Where to see cherry blossoms in Copenhagen ⬇️ 🌸  Here’s a list of some of the best places to see the beautiful cherry blossoms in the Danish capital:  📍Bispebjerg Kirkegård (most beautiful place) 📍Langelinje Park 📍Halmtorvet
📍Sønder Boulevard 📍Den Sorte Plads/Superkilen Nørrebro 📍Tivoli
📍Amaliehave 📍Assistens Kirkegård 📍Kongens Have
📍Hostrups Have 📍Botanisk Have  Please remember that Bispebjerg and Assistens are cemeteries, so respect the graves and the fact that people also come here to mourn the loss of a loved one 🤝  Do you know any more places to experience Sakura in Copenhagen? Share them in a comment 🥰🌸  #sakura #sakuracopenhagen #copenhagen #thingstodoincopenhagen #traveltips #denmarktravel
